query:
SELECT c.name, c.whatsappPhone, c.email, c.address, a.id, a.scheduledDate, a.status, a.notes, a.createdAt
FROM clients c
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON c.id = a.clientId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Joan%' OR c.whatsappPhone LIKE '%3105241784%'
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
